footer.tagline: Your premier destination for sports products and posters

f1.name: F1
f1.description: Discover our exclusive Formula 1 collection. Posters of tracks, drivers and teams, accessories like miniature cars, keychains, hats and jerseys.

football.name: Football
football.description: Explore our football poster collection. Posters of players, teams and iconic moments from the top clubs around the world.

basketball.name: Basketball
basketball.description: Browse our basketball poster collection. Posters of legendary players, teams and historic moments from the NBA and international basketball.

cars.name: Cars
cars.description: Discover our car poster collection. Posters of classic cars, modern supercars and iconic moments from the world of motorsport.

movies.name: Movies
movies.description: Explore our movie poster collection. Iconic posters from classic and contemporary films, popular TV series and beloved characters.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: For any questions, suggestions or requests, we are here for you!
contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We will contact you soon.
contact.name: Name
contact.aboutText: Welcome to Fan Zone! For all sports enthusiasts, we offer a wide range of products and collections. Our goal is to bring the excitement of sports into your homes with products that reflect our passion for sport.

faq.orderAnswer: Select one or more products, add them to the cart or click 'Buy Now', and fill in the form with your delivery details. Upon completion of the order, you will receive a confirmation email.
faq.shippingAnswer: Shipping is free for orders over 1,500 ALL, while for orders below this amount, shipping costs 200 ALL.
faq.deliveryAnswer: Delivery arrives within 1-3 business days after order confirmation.

product.shippingText: Your order will be processed quickly and delivered to your address with care.

product.qualityFeature3: Frames are lightweight and ready to hang
product.qualityFeature4: Canvas is stretched and ready to hang
product.qualityFeature6: All sizes come with included mounting systems
